name: The Agent of Destruction - Venus
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>破</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>は</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>壊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>代</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>行</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ヴィーナス
desc: You can banish 1 "The Agent of Creation - Venus" from your GY; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can pay LP in multiples of 500, then for every 500 LP paid, target 1 of your "Mystical Shine Ball" that is banished or in your GY; Special Summon them, but place them on the bottom of the Deck when they leave the field. You can only use 1 "The Agent of Destruction - Venus" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
mnst_eff: You can banish 1 "The Agent of Creation - Venus" from your GY; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can pay LP in multiples of 500, then for every 500 LP paid, target 1 of your "Mystical Shine Ball" that is banished or in your GY; Special Summon them, but place them on the bottom of the Deck when they leave the field. You can only use 1 "The Agent of Destruction - Venus" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Returns to the Deck other cards when they leave the field
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons the player's banished monsters
